---
title: "Agness Chisale"
subtitle: "Environmental Scientist | Geospatial Analyst"
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">
---

<div class="contact-bar">
  <a href="mailto:agnesschisale8@gmail.com" title="Email"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i></a>
  <a href="https://github.com/AgnessChisale" target="_blank" title="GitHub"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i></a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/agness-chisale-ab4199188/" target="_blank" title="LinkedIn"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i></a>
  <span><i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i> Vancouver, BC</span>
</div>

---

<section id="about">

## <i class="fa-regular fa-user"></i> About Me

<div class="hero-section">
<div class="hero-text">
I am a geospatial analyst and environmental scientist passionate about using spatial data, GIS and remote sensing to support environmental management and data-driven decision-making. I am currently pursuing a Master's degree in Geomatics for Environmental Management at the University of British Columbia. I also hold a Bachelor's degree in Environmental Science and Technology from the University of Malawi, earned with distinction. I am technically fluent in ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, Python and R.
</div>
<div class="hero-image">
<div class="image-circle">
<img src="./images/Aggie.jpg" alt="Agness Chisale">
</div>
</div>
</div>

</section>

---

<section id="skills">

## <i class="fa-regular fa-lightbulb"></i> Skills

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-map"></i> GIS &amp; Spatial Analysis</h3>
<p><code>ArcGIS Pro</code> <code>QGIS</code> <code>PostGIS</code> <code>PostgreSQL</code> <code>GDAL</code> <code>Kart</code> <code>Leaflet</code></p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-satellite"></i> Remote Sensing</h3>
<p><code>LiDAR</code> <code>ENVI</code> <code>Google Earth Engine</code> <code>PDAL</code> <code>lidR</code> <code>Hyperspectral Analysis</code></p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-code"></i> Programming &amp; Data Science</h3>
<p><code>Python</code> <code>R</code> <code>SQL</code> <code>ArcPy</code> <code>GeoPandas</code> <code>Rasterio</code> <code>ggplot2</code> <code>Scikit-learn</code> <code>Machine Learning</code></p>
</div>

</div>

</section>

---

<section id="projects">

## <i class="fa-regular fa-folder-open"></i> Projects

<div class="projects-grid">

<a href="./projects.html#gis-cartography" class="project-card-link">
<div class="card project-card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-map"></i> GIS &amp; Cartography</h3>
<p>Geocoding, feature digitization, old growth forest mapping, and cartographic modelling using ArcGIS Pro and QGIS.</p>
</div>
</a>

<a href="./projects.html#hydrology-wildlife" class="project-card-link">
<div class="card project-card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-water"></i> Hydrology &amp; Wildlife Analysis</h3>
<p>Salmon stream network analysis, riparian area management, and least cost path modelling for grizzly bear habitat corridors.</p>
</div>
</a>

<a href="./projects.html#forest-ecosystem" class="project-card-link">
<div class="card project-card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-tree"></i> Forest &amp; Ecosystem Analysis</h3>
<p>LiDAR-derived forest products, individual tree detection, and old growth forest stand characterization across BC.</p>
</div>
</a>

<a href="./projects.html#remote-sensing" class="project-card-link">
<div class="card project-card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-satellite-dish"></i> Remote Sensing &amp; Earth Observation</h3>
<p>Hyperspectral data processing, object-based image classification, and land cover analysis using Google Earth Engine.</p>
</div>
</a>

<a href="./projects.html#python-scripting" class="project-card-link">
<div class="card project-card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-terminal"></i> Python &amp; Geospatial Scripting</h3>
<p>Automated geospatial workflows using Python, ArcPy, GeoPandas, Rasterio and machine learning for spatial analysis.</p>
</div>
</a>

<a href="./projects.html#capstone" class="project-card-link">
<div class="card project-card capstone-card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-fire"></i> Wildfire Evacuation Routing</h3>
<p>Capstone: optimal evacuation route modelling for a wildfire scenario on Mudge Island, BC using least cost path analysis.</p>
<span class="capstone-badge">Capstone</span>
</div>
</a>

</div>

</section>

---

<section id="experience">

## <i class="fa-regular fa-briefcase"></i> Experience

<div class="card-grid-stacked">

<div class="card exp-card">
<div class="exp-logo-placeholder"><i class="fa-solid fa-earth-africa"></i></div>
<div class="exp-content">
<h3>Geospatial Analyst (Volunteer)</h3>
<h4>Tayo Climate Partners &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; 2025 – Present &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; Remote</h4>
<p>Supporting blue carbon and coastal restoration projects through spatial analysis and site suitability assessments for mangrove ecosystem restoration.</p>
<p><code>GIS</code> <code>ArcGIS</code> <code>Python</code> <code>R</code></p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card exp-card">
<div class="exp-logo-placeholder"><i class="fa-solid fa-city"></i></div>
<div class="exp-content">
<h3>Environmental Officer</h3>
<h4>Lilongwe City Council &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; July 2024 – May 2025 &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; Lilongwe, Malawi</h4>
<p>Urban development compliance, environmental auditing, and stakeholder engagement across infrastructure and waste projects.</p>
<p><code>GIS</code> <code>ArcGIS</code> <code>ESMPs</code> <code>Environmental Auditing</code></p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card exp-card">
<div class="exp-logo-placeholder"><i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass-chart"></i></div>
<div class="exp-content">
<h3>Environmental Consultant</h3>
<h4>Water, Waste and Environmental Consultants &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; 2022 – 2024 &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; Lilongwe, Malawi</h4>
<p>Environmental and social impact assessment across energy and infrastructure projects. Field data collection, geospatial analysis and statistical modelling.</p>
<p><code>GIS</code> <code>ArcGIS</code> <code>SPSS</code> <code>STATA</code></p>
</div>
</div>

</div>

</section>

---

<section id="education">

## <i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i> Education

<div class="card-grid-stacked">

<a href="https://www.ubc.ca/" target="_blank" class="edu-card-link">
<div class="card edu-card">
<div class="edu-logo-placeholder"><i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i></div>
<div class="edu-content">
<h3>University of British Columbia</h3>
<h4>Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management</h4>
<p class="edu-date"><i class="fa-regular fa-calendar"></i> July 2025 – April 2026 &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; Vancouver, Canada</p>
<p><code>Spatial Analysis</code> <code>Remote Sensing</code> <code>GIS</code> <code>Python</code> <code>R</code> <code>Environmental Management</code></p>
</div>
<i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up-right-from-square edu-arrow"></i>
</div>
</a>

<a href="https://www.unima.ac.mw/" target="_blank" class="edu-card-link">
<div class="card edu-card">
<div class="edu-logo-placeholder"><i class="fa-solid fa-university"></i></div>
<div class="edu-content">
<h3>University of Malawi</h3>
<h4>BSc Environmental Science and Technology — Environmental Management</h4>
<p class="edu-date"><i class="fa-regular fa-calendar"></i> March 2018 – December 2022 &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; Malawi</p>
<p><code>Environmental Management</code> <code>GIS</code> <code>Field Methods</code> <code>Statistics</code> <code>Research Methods</code></p>
</div>
<i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up-right-from-square edu-arrow"></i>
</div>
</a>

</div>

</section>

---

<section id="certifications">

## <i class="fa-solid fa-certificate"></i> Certifications

<div class="card-grid-stacked">

<a href="https://yalichallenge.org/" target="_blank" class="edu-card-link">
<div class="card edu-card">
<div class="edu-logo-placeholder"><i class="fa-solid fa-globe"></i></div>
<div class="edu-content">
<h3>Young African Leaders Initiative (YALI)</h3>
<h4>Certificate of Civic Leadership</h4>
<p class="edu-date"><i class="fa-regular fa-calendar"></i> 2021</p>
<p><code>Civic Leadership</code> <code>Community Development</code> <code>Policy</code> <code>Governance</code></p>
</div>
<i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up-right-from-square edu-arrow"></i>
</div>
</a>

<a href="https://www.africadronedataacademy.com/" target="_blank" class="edu-card-link">
<div class="card edu-card">
<div class="edu-logo-placeholder"><i class="fa-solid fa-plane"></i></div>
<div class="edu-content">
<h3>African Drone and Data Academy</h3>
<h4>Certificate in Drone &amp; Data Technology</h4>
<p class="edu-date"><i class="fa-regular fa-calendar"></i> 2023</p>
<p><code>Drone Operations</code> <code>Data Collection</code> <code>Remote Sensing</code> <code>Geospatial Data</code></p>
</div>
<i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up-right-from-square edu-arrow"></i>
</div>
</a>

<a href="https://yali.state.gov/" target="_blank" class="edu-card-link">
<div class="card edu-card">
<div class="edu-logo-placeholder"><i class="fa-solid fa-trophy"></i></div>
<div class="edu-content">
<h3>YALI RLC-SA Innovation Challenge</h3>
<h4>Finalist</h4>
<p class="edu-date"><i class="fa-regular fa-calendar"></i> 2024</p>
<p><code>Innovation</code> <code>Entrepreneurship</code> <code>Leadership</code></p>
</div>
<i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up-right-from-square edu-arrow"></i>
</div>
</a>

</div>

</section>
